data.name: Reel_When choosing a home, look beyond the broch

creative.body:
When choosing a home, look beyond the brochure.

✔ Is the layout practical for everyday life?
✔ Will the architecture still feel elegant 10 years from now?
✔ Are the amenities ones your family will actually use?
✔ Does the community feel calm - not crowded?

That’s the difference between buying a house and choosing the right home.

Visit and experience it for yourself.
📞 8341066 909 | 7868 909 909

#amarabydeevyashakti #trendingreel #LuxuryHomesHyderabad #realestatetrends #hyderabadrealestate #neoclassicalarchitecture #dreamhome #hyderabadairport

data.name: Reel_The wait is almost over — CREDAI

creative.body:
The wait is almost over — CREDAI Property Show 2026 begins in 2 days.

For those who look beyond first impressions and focus on how a home truly fits their life, Amara by Deevyashakti is worth experiencing.

📍 HITEX | Hall 4 | Stall G3
🗓️ 6–8 Feb

creative.body:
Hyderabad, here’s your dream home moment! 🏡✨
Amara by Deevyashakti Realty is unveiling 4 stunning model flats — Neo-Classical, Contemporary, Modern & Minimalist. 💫

Special launch offers only this weekend — don’t miss it!
#AmaraByDeevyashakti #ModelFlatLaunch #HyderabadHomes

data.name: Reel_✨ Step inside Amara, where dream homes take shape! 🏡

creative.body:
✨ Step inside Amara, where dream homes take shape! 🏡
This weekend, experience 4 fully staged Model Flats in Neo-Classical, Contemporary, Modern & Minimalist styles — designed to inspire your lifestyle.

📅 Aug 30 & 31 | ⏰ 10 AM – 6 PM
📍 Gaganpahad, Rajendranagar

🎉 Exclusive launch-day offers await!

#AmaraByDeevyashakti #GrandLaunch #HyderabadRealEstate #ModelFlats #HomeInspiration

Features:
✅ 2.5 & 3 BHK homes (1525 to 2233 sqft)
✅ 5.2-acre gated community with neoclassical design 🏛️
✅ 70% open spaces, rooftop infinity pool, and 24,000 sqft clubhouse 🏡

Advantages:
✅ Spacious homes with international-style car-free podiums ensure peaceful living.
✅ Easy connectivity via NH 44, only 20 mins from Mehdipatnam 🚗
✅100% Vaastu compliant for holistic living 🌟

Benefits: Step into a life of aspirations, convenience, and tranquility at Amara.
Click 'Learn More 👇' to explore your future home. 💼

Premium Living Redefined - 2.5 & 3 BHKs in Gaganpahad, Rajendranagar starting from ₹95 Lakh
